summary:
Created tests/test_email_llm_synth_extended.py with 26 comprehensive tests covering email, LLM, and synthetic modules.

Test Coverage:

Email Tests (9 tests):
- SMTP connection failure retries twice before sendmail fallback
- SMTP authentication failures trigger fallback
- Invalid/empty recipients return False gracefully
- Template rendering with empty entries
- StrictUndefined enforcement for missing template variables
- Legacy Mailer module SMTP failure handling

LLM Tests (7 tests):
- GitHub Models timeout falls back to Amplifier CLI
- Both backends fail → RuntimeError with error chain
- complete_sync() works in non-async context
- GitHub Models subprocess failure handling
- Dry-run mode returns stub responses (async and sync wrappers)

Summarizer Tests (2 tests):
- LLM failure falls back to 120-char body excerpt
- Empty body returns empty excerpt

Synthetic Tests (8 tests):
- Same seed produces identical output (deterministic)
- Different seeds produce different output
- Generated batch includes maintainer first-person language
- Calibrated mix with pain keyword hits (70%+) and failures (5%+)
- All URLs unique across batch
- url_hash SHA-256 populated for all posts
- Multiple platforms represented (Reddit, HN, etc.)
- Platform distribution roughly balanced (>=10% each)

All tests mock SMTP and subprocess calls. All 26 tests pass. Existing tests (51) continue passing. Total: 77 passing tests.
